overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark, abandoned institutional facility resembling a derelict hospital or asylum. The player navigates through graffiti-covered corridors with scattered medical equipment and debris, experiencing dynamic lighting changes that create a tense horror atmosphere typical of modern survival horror games.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned hospital corridor with medical privacy screens

agents.ego_description: cautiously advancing through the derelict corridor, observing graffiti-covered walls and scattered medical debris

entered.detail: folding medical privacy screen on wheels with blue fabric panels
concrete wall covered in black spray paint tags and graffiti markings
empty metal hospital gurney with wheels positioned against the wall
overhead fluorescent light panels providing dim greenish illumination
scattered papers, cardboard pieces, and broken materials littering the floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow abandoned institutional corridor with blue medical privacy screens and graffiti-covered walls. The player walks forward past scattered debris and medical equipment under flickering fluorescent lights, establishing the derelict horror atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: darkened corridor section with failing electrical lights

events.description: overhead fluorescent lights dim significantly reducing visibility to near darkness
screen vignette darkens simulating eye adjustment to the low light conditions

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the increasingly dark corridor section with reduced visibility

segments.scene_description: As the player progresses, the corridor lights fail dramatically, plunging the scene into near-total darkness with only a screen vignette visible. The blue privacy screen and graffiti walls remain visible to the left but fade as the player moves deeper into the darkened section.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict institutional corridor intersection with scattered medical waste

events.description: lights return to full brightness revealing the corridor intersection and medical equipment
turning right to survey the side corridor with additional debris and wall details

agents.ego_description: turning right to explore the wider corridor area, panning across medical equipment and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: pile of discarded medical supplies and broken furniture against the right wall
brown wooden hand rail mounted along the left wall at waist height
dark open doorway leading to another room or corridor section
exposed ceiling ventilation grate with missing tiles revealing darkness above

segments.scene_description: The lights suddenly return revealing a wider corridor section with a pile of medical equipment on the right and a doorway ahead. The player turns right to survey the area, showing ceiling vents and more graffiti-covered walls while moving away from the privacy screens into a new section of the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a derelict institutional corridor that shifts from flickering light into oppressive darkness before reopening into a wider facility section. It begins by advancing past blue medical privacy screens and graffiti-covered walls, moving through scattered debris under the erratic pulse of fluorescent lights. As the player progresses, the lighting fails dramatically, plunging the environment into near-total darkness where the surrounding walls and screens fade into a heavy vignette. The scene then abruptly brightens as the lights return, revealing a more expansive corridor with piles of medical equipment and ceiling vents. The camera finally turns right to survey the graffiti-strewn walls and a distant doorway, moving away from the initial screens and deeper into the facility.
